allow: Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./src/localization/translations/en.json'\); console.log\('valid, keys:', Object.keys\(j\).length, '| has Integrations:', !!j['Integrations'], '| has timer key:', !!j['notification.timer.custom.body']\);")
Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('@mdi/js'\); console.log\('mdiDiaper' in icons, 'mdiBabyBottle' in icons, 'mdiBreastfeeding' in icons, 'mdiHumanRunning' in icons\);")

Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('@mdi/js'\); const keys = Object.keys\(icons\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('diaper'\)\)\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('breast'\)\)\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('human'\)\)\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('baby'\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('@mdi/js'\); const keys = Object.keys\(icons\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('run'\)\)\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('nursing'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('lactat'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('pump'\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('@mdi/js'\); const keys = Object.keys\(icons\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('swim'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('bike'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('yoga'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('dumbbell'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('spoon'\)\)\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('medication'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('tooth'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('ear'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('pillow'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('abacus'\)\)\);")
